creator: crees@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

You should use OPTIONS_SET=UNZIP for the fpc-unzip slave port; you 
shouldn't be able to install that and disable the OPTION.  Also, please 
up OPTIONS_DEFINE and OPTIONS_DEFAULT together, rather than _DESC in 
between.  Some places you've also written DESCR instead-- how well did 
you test these? ;)
